recap: Deleted oroshi-old.vim (529-line VimScript colorscheme); already committed by user prior to session.
Deleted mp3.test.rb and music-metadata-update.test.rb; tests/ kept because tests/data/ fixture files exist.
Deleted all 23 scripts in docker/__legacy/; 16 were dead aliases, 7 full-name scripts either had active replacements or were confirmed unused via zsh history.
Migrated gifmin, jpgmin, png-mask, png2ico, tif2jpg, img-height, img-width to ZSH before deleting img/__legacy/ entirely.
